package rulecoverage

func PositiveRootMainGoInLayeredServiceRepo() string {
    ruleID := "root_main_go_in_layered_service_repo"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layered service repos that keep the primary binary at repository-root `main.go` instead of `cmd/<name>/main.go`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
